title: TiKV reports "Data is corrupted, missing data for NOT NULL column" while TiFlash returns data after sequence of ALTER TABLE MODIFY COLUMN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, age INT DEFAULT 0);
ALTER TABLE t1 ADD COLUMN salary DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00;
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
UPDATE t1 SET salary = 50000.00 WHERE id = 1;
ALTER TABLE t1 ALTER COLUMN age TYPE BIGINT NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE MODIFY COLUMN on NOT NULL column
